message:
fix: convert 10 libc wrapper calls to raw syscalls

Eliminates host glibc wrapper call dependencies by converting to direct
syscalls in fortify_abi and glibc_internal_abi:

- __sched_get_priority_max/min: libc wrapper → SYS_sched_get_priority_*
- __bsd_getpgrp: libc::getpgid → SYS_getpgid
- __mq_open_2: libc::mq_open → SYS_mq_open
- __open_2/__open64_2: libc::open → SYS_open
- __openat_2/__openat64_2: libc::openat → SYS_openat
- __pread_chk/__pread64_chk: libc::pread → SYS_pread64
- __recv_chk: libc::recv → SYS_recvfrom (with null addr)
- __recvfrom_chk: libc::recvfrom → SYS_recvfrom

Also adds SYS_SCHED_GET_PRIORITY_MAX/MIN constants for x86_64/aarch64.
Callthrough census remains at 0 symbols.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
